idea-plugin.name: Workspace Package Navigator
idea-plugin.description:
Workspace Package Navigator improves the Go-to Declaration action for projects that use npm workspaces and linked packages inside node_modules.

When a dependency in node_modules is actually a symlink to a local workspace package, the plugin helps navigation lead you to the real source code instead of an intermediate location.

This is especially useful in monorepos and modular JavaScript or TypeScript projects, where standard Go to Declaration behavior may jump through dependency paths rather than opening the actual workspace package implementation. Workspace Package Navigator makes that navigation more natural, direct, and predictable.
